titleStmt.title: SII 34.120: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 120. Tiruveṟumbūr, Tiruchirappalli Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District. On the west and south walls of the central shrine in the Piplikēśvara temple.

summary.p: Chōḻa, Parakēsarivarman Rājēndra I, 7th year = A.D. 1019.

The sabhā of Śrīkaṇṭha-chaturvēdimaṅgalam a brahmadēya in Mikōḻai a subdivision of Pāṇḍikulāśani-vaḷanāḍu on the southern bank remitted all taxes (iṟai, echchōṟu, veṭṭi, vētiṉai, tirukkoṟṟavāchalil-pōnda-kuḍimai) on some dēvadāna land of the Tiruveṟumbiyūr temple in lieu of the interest on the a sum of 202 kāsu they received from the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tirumaṉṉivaḷara Irunilamaṭantaiyum poṟceyapāvaiyum cīrttaṉic celviyum peruntEviyarāki Iṉpūṟa neṭutiyal Ūḻiyuḷ Iṭaiytuṟaināṭum tuṭar vaṉavElip paṭar yum cuḷḷiccūḻ matiḷk koḷḷippākkayum naṇṇaṟkarumuraṇ maṇṇaikkaṭakkamum porukaṭal Īḻattaraicar tammuṭiyum Āṅkavar tEviyar Oṅkeḻil muṭiyum muṉṉavar pakkal teṉṉavar vaitta cuntaramuṭiyum Intiraṉ Āramum teṇṭicai Īḻamaṇṭalamuḻuvatum Eṟipaṭaik kEraḷaṉ muṟaimaiyil cūṭum kulataṉamākiya palar pukaḻ muṭiyum ceṅkatirmālaiyum caṅkatir Irupattorukāl Araicu kaḷaikaṭṭa paracurāmaṉ mElvaruñ cān=timaṟṟīvaraṇ karuti Iruttiya cempoṟṟi takumuṭiyum māpporu taṇṭāṟkoṇṭa kOpparakEca
ripanmarāṉa śrīrājēntraśoḻa devaṟku yāṇṭu 7 teṉkarai pāṇṭi kulācaṉi vaḷanāṭṭu mīkōḻai brahmadeyam śrīkaṇṭa ścaturvetimaṅkalattu peruṅkuṟi sabhaiōm kai Ivvūr tiruveṟumpiyūr Āḻvār śaṇḍeśvarapperumāḷ śrīhastattāl yāṅkaḷ koṇṭu kaṭava Aṉṟāṭu naṟkācu kuṟṟamaṟṟaṉa koṇṭakācu 2 100 2 Ikkācu Irunūṟṟu Iraṇṭukācum koṇṭu kaṭavōmāyk koṇṭa paricāvatu Ivvāṭṭai Iṣabha nāyaṟu mutalākkācu 1 kkut tiṅkaṭ kālakkap palicaiyāṟ polintu Ōrāṭṭai nāḷaikkup palicaiyāl vanta kācu 5 10 Ikkācu Aimpatti pērppaṭṭatukkum nāṅkaḷēy Ikkāci Iṟaiyum Eccōṟu veṭṭi vētiṉaiyum tirukkoṟṟavācalil pōnta kuṭimaiyu maṟṟum Ūriṭuvari E
ppēṟpaṭṭa Iṟaiyum ni
tēvatāṉammāṉa nilam
lamaṉṟi yiṟuppittuku
ṭuttōm tiruveṟumpiyūr rukku śrīkaṇḍaccaturvetimaṅkalattup peruṅkuṟi sabhaiyōm Āttiraiyaṉ mahādevaṉ parameśvaraṉ paṇiyāl Ivvūr matdhyastaṉ Utaiyadivākaraṉ Irā mapra Ivaiyeṉ Eḻuttu
Ippaṭi Aṟivēṉ koṭṭippuṟattu Aṉanta nārāyaṇa kramavittaṉṉēṉ Ippaṭi Aṟivēṉ valavūr māppāṇi nārāyaṇaṉ jātavētaṉṉēṉ Ippaṭi Aṟivēṉ kavarkāci subrahmaṇyaṉṉēṉ Ippaṭi Aṟivēṉ po
ippaṭi Aṟivēṉ kāccuvaṉ nārāyaṇaṉ keṅkātiraṉṉēṉ Ippaṭi Aṟivēṉ valavūr māppāṉi cikaṇṭaṉ tirumā ru cō nārāyaṇaṉṉēṉ Ippaṭi Aṟivēṉ valavūr māppāṉi nārāyaṇaṉ
Digital edition of SII 34.120 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
